name: Hawaiian Chicken Breasts
recipeIngredient: Flour seasoned with salt and pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the green onion tops, about 1 inch long.
2. Saute the chopped onions in 1 tablespoon of butter until glazed.
3. Transfer the sauteed onions to a crock pot.
4. Coat the chicken breasts with seasoned flour.
5. Saute the coated chicken breasts in butter until brown on both sides.
6. Add the cooked chicken to the crock pot containing the onions.
7. Drain any excess pineapple juice from the can and pour over the chicken.
8. Cover and cook on low for 3-4 hours or high for 1 1/2 - 2 hours, or until the chicken breasts are tender.
9. Saute pineapple slices in butter until golden.
10. Place each sauteed pineapple slice on a heated serving platter.
11. Top each chicken breast with a slice of avocado.
12. Slice the remaining avocado into 8 lengthwise strips and place 2 strips on each chicken breast.
13. Serve the pan drippings over hot, buttered rice.
